'''Hurd's Moon''' was a desert world.<ref name="SEE1">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 1|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 1]]</ref>

Several [[Skyhook/Legends|Skyhooks]] could be seen on the planet from orbit. Visitors to the world were obliged to check their weapons during their stay.<ref name="SEE1" />

[[Massad Thrumble]] owned a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on Hurd's Moon, drawing the [[Human replica droid]], Guri, there for a chance at reprogramming. [[Guri]] traveled in order to be reprogrammed following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="SEE1" />

{{Planet-stub}}
